svg.title: Dating 2046 Futures Wheel — Radial v3
svg.desc: Radial three-ring futures wheel with parent-clustered layout. Center: de-monetization wall. Ring 1 (A-E): five STEEP-dimension direct implications around center. Ring 2 (A1-CE1): nine reactive consequences placed near their assigned parent. Ring 3 (1-6): six systemic restructurings near their Ring 2 parent, colored by cone tag. Multi-cone Ring 3 nodes use pie segments.
svg.text: Ring 1 (STEEP): A=T+S, B=Environmental, C=Political, D=Economic, E=Social. Ring 2 inherits parent color.
Ring 3 cone tag: blue=Projected, green=Preferred, red=Preposterous. Pie segments show multi-cone nodes.
Connection Club artifact = intersection of Ring 3 nodes 3 (stratification, parent D1) and 6 (aviation+VR, parent BD1).
